title: Student / Trainee Frontend Developer
description: Started my journey into software development while studying. Learned the fundamentals of web development and began working with Angular, state management, and modern frontend practices.

title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Worked as a frontend developer, building and maintaining enterprise applications. My responsibilities included implementing new features, optimizing performance, and integrating SIP-based communication solutions.

title: Fullstack Developer
description: Currently working as a fullstack developer, responsible for both frontend and backend development. On the frontend, I continue to build scalable Angular applications with advanced UI components, while on the backend I develop robust APIs and business logic using .NET and Entity Framework.
